name: combobox
description: A searchable select with a progressive-enhancement contract (ADR-0012, v-next): JS-OFF it IS a real <input role="combobox"> + <ul role="listbox"> + <input type="hidden"> — fully accessible and form-functional with zero JavaScript. JS-ON the colocated combobox.enhancer.ts activates the WAI-ARIA APG Combobox/listbox pattern (editable text input, client-side option filtering, popover seam for open/close, write-back to the hidden form field) while delegating listbox keyboard navigation (ArrowUp/Down/Home/End/Enter via aria-activedescendant, typeahead) to the shared collection-nav.enhancer.ts. Free-type mode commits any typed text on blur/Enter; select-only mode reverts to the last committed label. Optionally clearable. Sizes sm/md/lg (toolbar-aligned). Groups render as WAI-ARIA role="group" with aria-labelledby. Loading state: aria-busy + spinner before options. No-results state: aria-disabled option. Listbox always in DOM (aria-controls must resolve per APG); visibility via native popover + CSS Anchor Positioning.
docs: Copies combobox.jte to your JTE root (lievit/combobox.jte) and combobox.enhancer.ts to your alias root. Import the enhancer from your main entry module and call enhanceAllComboboxes() on load and after DOM swaps. JS-OFF the server-rendered <input role="combobox"> + <ul role="listbox"> + <input type="hidden"> are fully accessible and the hidden field POSTs the committed value; JS-ON the enhancer activates filtering, open/close, write-back, and blur commits, delegating listbox arrow-key nav to the shared collection-nav.enhancer.ts. Requires collection-nav.enhancer.ts and popover-anchor.enhancer.ts from the lievit runtime. Pass options (List), optionGroups (Map of group label to List), or a hand-authored content slot. Set mode="free-type" to allow committing values not in the list. Use clearable=true for an x button. Sizes sm/md/lg. The NET-NEW token --lv-combobox-listbox-max-h (260px default) controls the listbox scroll height; override in :root for dense UIs.
